<!-- Use this template for pull requests. Keep entries concise and link to issues or RFCs when applicable. -->

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related issues / RFC

Link to any related issue(s) or RFCs.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] Security considerations noted (if relevant)
- [ ] Suggested version bump (MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH) included (if relevant)
- [ ] "Constitution compliance" note added describing which principles are affected and how gates are met

## Notes for reviewers

Any special instructions for running the change or reviewing complex logic.
